title: PostgreSQL Full-Text Search, Ranking, Language, and Abuse Budgets
description: Search concatenates SQL, indexes raw HTML, assumes one language, ranking is unexplained, snippets render unsafe markup, and broad queries consume unbounded work. Learners cumulatively produce bounded explainable entry search through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Build a provenance-aware tsvector from admitted title, summary, safe text content, author, and categories with weighting and language policy.
Convert bounded user input through an explicit plainto, websearch, or structured tsquery policy and reject pathological or empty requests.
Pair GIN and supporting indexes with representative EXPLAIN evidence, data scale, selectivity, write cost, and regression thresholds.
